welcome.title: Getting started with LifeRadar
welcome.intro: LifeRadar helps you organise, evaluate, and improve every dimension of your life — all in one place.

pillars.title: Life Pillars
pillars.desc: Structure your life into meaningful pillars and sub-pillars — from health and career to family and personal growth.

evaluations.title: Evaluations
evaluations.desc: Periodically score each life area to gain clear insight into where you stand and where to focus your energy.

decisions.title: Decisions
decisions.desc: Convert your evaluation insights into concrete, actionable decisions that drive real and lasting change.

ticktick.title: TickTick Integration
ticktick.desc: Push your decisions and action items straight to TickTick so nothing falls through the cracks.

landing.subtitle: Your personal life balance compass

signin.title: Already have an account?
signin.desc: Sign in to access your personalised dashboard.

register.title: New here?
register.desc: Create a free account and start tracking your life today.

landing.privacy: Your data stays private and secure.

contact.bannerButton: We want to hear from you

modal.title: We want to hear from you
modal.intro: Have a question, a suggestion, or just want to say hello? Drop us a message and we will be in touch.
modal.name: Your name
modal.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
modal.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what's on your mind…
modal.messageRequired: Please enter a message (at least 10 characters).
modal.successDesc: Thank you for reaching out. We will get back to you soon.
modal.error: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
